item.title: Are you stuck?- A dump.
item.description:
The majority of these don't need to be unmuted. I've put the ones that need, or would be better with, sound at the end and one that might be considered NSFW last.
Unmute from here down.
Those subtitles are shit but I think some of you will need them.

item.title: 16th Fave
item.description: Still drinking too much, even with heart issues. I have cut back but I find it hard to quit. THis sculpture speaks to me on a deep fucking level.

item.title: I LOVE HOW THIS ONE CAME OUT!
item.description: Yet another small portrait for my series of portraits of people I've met in bars and discos: Creatures Of The Night. I really love how this one came out! If you'd like to support me: ---› One-time donations: paypal.me/anisjerbi ---› Monthly donations: patreon.com/anis_jerbi_art To commission an artwork from me, contact me here on imgur or via my official website: anisjerbi.com

item.title: My 16th fav, the earth from above
item.description:
Barcelona, Spain
New York City, USA
Dubai, UAE
Paris, France
Chicago, USA
Nördlingen, Germany
Sydney, Australia
Seattle, USA
Bern, Switzerland
Giza, Egypt
Mount Reinebringen, Norway
Vatican City
Vancouver, Canada
Shanghai, China
Amsterdam, Netherlands
Bac Son Valley, Vietnam
Mexico City, Mexico
Venice, Italy
Athens, Greece
Moscow, Russia
Turin, Italy
Island in the Maldives
Cape Town, South Africa
Mogadishu, Somalia
Orange County, FL, USA
Tulip field in Spoorbuurt , Netherlands
San Francisco, USA

item.title: Awesome things
item.description:
1. Fountains made to look like dandelion clocks
2. Pencil shaped traffic posts outside a pre-school
3. A zip made out of tiny goth skulls
4. Parthenon barcode on a Greek yoghurt
5. Japanese sanitation access cover
6. A lacy hi-vis gilet
7. Wet floor sign
8. Clothespin shaped bench
9. Bicycle parking zone
10. A cork-shaped barstool
11. A pencil that looks like a judge's gavel
12. Under the slide in a playground
13. Sponge holder
14. Combo watering jug and spray for houseplants Credits to deMilked, Pininterest, and Geek Universe.
item.dc:creator: Twinklepot
